text: The tilt of my head reminds me how easily perspective distorts perception. Inside, innovation is celebrated under the bold letters R+D, hinting at a quest for meaning in progress. Surrounded by curated words and technology, I feel both inspired by human creativity and awed by the impersonality of modern spaces. There is a quiet invitation here to ponder the intersection of human experience and technological advancement. I feel curious, slightly detached, and eager to discover what thoughts these displays will provoke in me.
